.rally-brand strong.fontFamily: Anton, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, "system-ui", "SF Pro Display", Inter, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

.rally-top-links a.fontFamily: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, "system-ui", "SF Pro Text", Inter, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

.rally-top-links a[aria-current=\"page\".fontFamily: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, "system-ui", "SF Pro Text", Inter, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

.rally-top-search input.fontFamily: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, "system-ui", "SF Pro Text", Inter, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

.theme-toggle-button.fontFamily: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, "system-ui", "SF Pro Text", Inter, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
